marked_piece_destination_count: {move_rule_text} How many simple-move destinations does the piece marked with an X have?
{move_rule_text} Count the adjacent empty points the X-marked piece can reach with one simple move.
{move_rule_text} What is the number of one-step destinations for the piece marked with an X?
{move_rule_text} Count only adjacent empty points reachable from the X-marked piece.
{move_rule_text} How many adjacent empty points can the X-marked piece reach without jumping?
marked_piece_capture_count: {capture_rule_text} How many immediate captures does the piece marked with an X have?
{capture_rule_text} Count the opponent pieces the X-marked piece can capture now.
{capture_rule_text} What is the number of immediate captures for the piece marked with an X?
{capture_rule_text} Count only opponent pieces that can be jumped over immediately by the X-marked piece.
{capture_rule_text} How many opponent pieces can the X-marked piece capture in one jump?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_balanced_midgame: a Sixteen Soldiers board with red and blue pieces on points connected by drawn movement lines
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_center_crossroads_mid: a Sixteen Soldiers board with red and blue pieces on points connected by drawn movement lines
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_triangle_wing_midgame: a Sixteen Soldiers board with red and blue pieces on points connected by drawn movement lines
code_prompt_defaults.move_rule_text: A simple move goes along one drawn line to an adjacent empty point. Do not count jumps or captures.
code_prompt_defaults.capture_rule_text: A capture is possible when the piece marked with an X can jump along one drawn straight line over an adjacent opponent piece and land on the empty point immediately beyond it.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_piece_destination: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every one-step adjacent empty destination for the piece marked with an X; use an empty array when the count is 0
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_piece_destination_cou: set "answer" to the number of one-step adjacent empty destinations for the piece marked with an X
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_piece_capture_cou: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every opponent piece that the X-marked piece can capture immediately; use an empty array if there are none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_piece_capture_count: set "answer" to the number of immediate captures available to the piece marked with an X
